title: Restore rich human-facing rendering and navigation
summary: Recover the stronger markdown structure, browseable tables, and summary-plus-detail navigation while keeping machine indexes compact.
scope_items: Restore richer plan overview and tracking layouts.
Improve migrated command docs, standards, references, and README navigation.
Reuse good main-branch rendering patterns without reviving docs-backed planning.
done_when_items: Human-facing docs regain rich navigation and tables while machine lookup remains compact and authoritative.
